full_citation: Silk, Jonathan A., 'Chinese Sūtras in Tibetan Translation: A Preliminary Survey,' Annual Report of the International Research Institute for Advanced Buddhology at Soka University 22 (2019): 227-246.

links.note: Silk 2019: 被甲莊嚴會 Pǐjiǎ zhuāngyán huì = Go cha'i bkod pa bstan pa
Silk 2019: 佛說入胎藏會 Fóshuō rù tāicáng huì = Dga' bo mngal na gnas pa bstan pa
Silk 2019: 佛為阿難說處胎會 Fó wéi Ānán shuō chǔtāi huì = Tshe dang ldan pa dga' bo la mngal du 'jug pa bstan pa
Silk 2019: 富樓那會 Fùlóunà huì = Gang pos zhus pa
Silk 2019: 無盡伏藏會 Wújìn fúcáng huì = Glog thob kyis zhus pa
Silk 2019: 淨信童女會 Jìngxìn tóngnǚ huì = Bu mo rnam dag dad pas zhus pa
Silk 2019: 楞伽阿跋多羅寶經 Léngqié ābáduōluó bǎojīng = Lang kar gshegs pa'i mdo las sangs rgyas thams cad kyi gsung gi snying po'i le'u
Silk 2019: 大般涅槃經 Dàbānniè pán jīng = Yongs su mya ngan las 'das pa chen po'i mdo
Silk 2019: 佛說如來心密藏經 Fóshuō rúlái xīn mìcáng jīng = Sangs rgyas kyi mdzod kyi chos yig
Silk 2019: 金剛三昧經 Jīngāng sānmèi jīng = Rdo rje ting nge 'dzin gyi chos kyi yi ge
Silk 2019: 持世經 Chíshì jīng = 'Phags pa 'jig rten 'dzin gyis yongs su dris pa zhes bya ba'i mdo
Silk 2019: 佛說觀彌勒菩薩上生兜率天經 Fóshuō guān Mílè púsà shàngshēng Dōushuàitiān jīng = Byang chub sems dpa' byams pa dga' ldan gnam du skye ba blangs pa'i mdo
Silk 2019: Bdud kyi le'u nyi tshe phyung ba
Silk 2019: 大乘大集地藏十輪經 Dàshèng dàjí dìzàng shílún jīng = Sa'i snying po 'khor lo bcu pa'i mdo
Silk 2019: 大乘同性經 Dàshèng tóngxìng jīng = Yongs su bsngo ba'i 'khor lo
Silk 2019: 大乘善見經 Dàshèng shànjiàn jīng (?) = Chos kyi rgya mo
Silk 2019: 得道梯橙錫杖經 Dédào tīchéng xīzhàng jīng = 'Khar gsil gyi mdo
Silk 2019: 得道梯橙錫杖經 Dédào tīchéng xīzhàng jīng (appendix) = 'Khar gsil 'chang ba'i kun spyod pa'i cho ga
Silk 2019: 賢愚經 Xiányú jīng = Mdzangs blun gyi mdo
Silk 2019: Rgyal bu don grub kyi mdo
Silk 2019: 大方便佛報恩經 Dà fāngbiàn fó bàoēn jīng = Thabs la mkhas pa chen po sangs rgyas kyis drin la lan blan pa pa'i chos kyi yi ge
Silk 2019: 善惡因果經 Shàn'è yīnguǒ jīng = Legs nyes kyi rgyu dang 'bras bu bstan pa
Silk 2019: 善惡因果經 Shàn'è yīnguǒ jīng = Dge ba dang mi dge ba'i las kyi rnam par smin pa bstan pa
Silk 2019: 四十二章經 Sìshí'èr zhāng jīng = Mig bcu gnyis pa'i mdo
Silk 2019: 金光明最勝王經 Jīn guāngmíng zuìshèng wáng jīng = Gser 'od dam pa
Silk 2019: 千手千眼觀世音菩薩廣大圓滿無礙大悲心陀羅尼經 Qiānshǒu qiānyǎn Guānshìyīn púsà guǎngdà yuánmǎn wúài dàbēixīn tuóluóní jīng = Spyan ras gzigs phyag stong spyan stong gzungs
Silk 2019: Zhal bcu gcig pa'i rig ngags kyi snying po
Silk 2019: 天地八陽神咒經 Tiāndì bāyáng shénzhòu jīng = Snang brgyad ces bya ba'i rig sngags
